abstract.text: Represents a physical key on the keyboard.

inlineContent.text: These are useful for defining controls with a consistent arrangement.
Text keys are named by their hand position in proper typing technique:
(reaching inward with an index finger), or
refers to what is commonly a space bar.
The same key can represent many different characters depending on the user’s current virtual keyboard or input source.
